project.name: Maison Plain-Pied - Demo Power BI
project.description: Projet de demonstration Power BI simulant la construction complete d'une maison plain-pied.

suppliers.comment: Taxes, autorisations et frais administratifs lies au permis.

budget_line_ref.category_name: Category name from the catalog/template source.
budget_line_ref.subcategory_name: Subcategory name from the catalog/template source.
budget_line_ref.product_name: Product/budget line name generated from the Maison Plain-Pied template.

transactions.supplier_key: One of the keys declared in suppliers, or null for DIY estimates.
transactions.amount_ht: Decimal string calculated from TTC with 20% VAT.
transactions.amount_vat: Decimal string calculated from TTC with 20% VAT.
transactions.amount_ttc: Decimal string from Cout_moyen, Cout_diy, or Cout_reel.
transactions.due_date: YYYY-MM-DD or null; quote and invoice only.
transactions.invoice_status: paid or unpaid for generated invoice transactions.
transactions.payment_method: wire for paid invoices, null otherwise.
transactions.select_as_budget: true only for the Cout_moyen quote transaction.
